patterns.name: Enter: fade + slight translate
patterns.notes: Prefer Motion initial/animate or CSS @keyframes; map duration to CSS variable for Tailwind.

patterns.name: Staggered list reveal
patterns.notes: Motion: transition.staggerChildren on parent. GSAP: timeline with position parameter.

patterns.name: Scroll-triggered reveal
patterns.notes: Motion: whileInView. Heavy scroll choreography: consider GSAP ScrollTrigger.

patterns.name: Scroll-linked progress (bar / scrub)
patterns.notes: Motion: useScroll + useTransform. GSAP: ScrollTrigger scrub for timelines.

patterns.name: Hover / tap micro-interaction
patterns.notes: Motion whileHover/whileTap; simple color/scale can stay CSS for weight.

patterns.name: Text reveal / split feel
patterns.notes: Start with opacity + y per line or word; advanced split typography may need GSAP SplitText (plugin) or manual spans.

patterns.name: SVG stroke / path draw
patterns.notes: Motion pathLength on path elements; match reduced-motion with static state.

patterns.name: Layout reorder / shared layout
patterns.notes: Motion layout and layoutId; avoid animating width/height without transform tricks.

patterns.name: Animated gradient / mesh background
patterns.notes: Prefer CSS variables + keyframes; canvas/WebGL only if needed for noise/mesh complexity.

patterns.name: Grid / dots / noise backdrop
patterns.notes: CSS background-image + animation; watch contrast for text readability.

patterns.name: Multi-step choreographed sequence
patterns.notes: GSAP timelines for complex sync; Motion for simpler ordered variants.

patterns.name: Lightweight timeline on DOM / SVG
patterns.notes: anime.js when you want imperative timelines without React component wrappers everywhere.

patterns.name: Basic 3D scene (model / orbit)
patterns.notes: Optional peer; lazy-load; provide static image fallback for low-power devices.

patterns.name: Authoring-driven 3D / property sequences
patterns.notes: Theatre.js for in-browser tuning; export values back to code for production if possible.
